landing.title: Fresh, Beautiful Flowers for Every Occasion
landing.subtitle: Whether you are celebrating a milestone, brightening up your home, or sending love to someone special, find the perfect handcrafted bouquet from our Porto artisans.

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Vincent Flowers Porto
about.desc1: Vincent Flowers Porto is a mother-daughter duo creating in harmony with nature.
about.desc2: We believe that nature is always perfectly balanced in its beauty; our job is simply to put its elements together. No bright wrapping paper, no artificial flowers—only elegant compositions akin to the ones found in nature.

b2b.title: Business & Hospitality
b2b.subtitle: Need floral design for your business? We’re here to help!
b2b.tailored_desc: Together, we will create a unique floral concept designed specifically for your venue.
b2b.full_service_desc: We handle everything—from the arrangements and vase selection to every finishing touch.
b2b.reliable_desc: With scheduled deliveries and regular maintenance, we ensure your flowers are always fresh.
b2b.contact_desc: Find the contact form below to get in touch with us

events.desc1: Need the perfect floral arrangement for your special day? Let us help fill your wedding not only with beautiful memories but with stunning florals, too.
events.contact_call: Get in touch to bring your wedding's floral design to life!
events.consultation_desc: Allow us to conceptualize the floral architecture for your upcoming event.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.delivery_desc1: We offer delivery services throughout Porto, Gaia, Matosinhos, and Maia. Delivery can be handled directly by our shop or through trusted third-party services like Uber or Bolt. The delivery fee is calculated based on distance once the order is placed.
faq.delivery_desc2: Please note that we require a minimum of 5 working hours notice for all orders, and deliveries are made between 09:00 and 18:00, 7 days a week.
faq.care_desc1: Once you have received your bouquet, here are a couple of steps we would recommend taking to prolong its blooming:
faq.care_1_desc: You will receive your flowers in an aquapack. Please do not lay the flowers on their side before unpacking, otherwise the water will leak out.
faq.care_2_desc: Before removing the aquapack, prepare a vase by filling it with room-temperature water and adding the flower food provided in the bag. Please wait until it has dissolved.
faq.care_3_desc: Once the water is ready, unpack the bouquet and place it in the water immediately. Stems should not be exposed to air for more than 30 seconds; otherwise, they must be trimmed again.
faq.care_4_desc: Your bouquet will bloom longer if it isn’t put under direct sunlight.
faq.returns_1: Floral composition is at the heart of our craft. We put a great deal of effort into ensuring each stem is perfectly placed, secure, and stable. For this reason, if you untie the bouquet and stems break as a result, we can no longer be held responsible for them.
faq.returns_2: However, if your flowers begin to darken or show signs of decay within 24 hours of delivery, please contact us via our contact form. We will carefully review the photos provided; if damage is confirmed, we will offer either a replacement or a full refund.
faq.returns_3: This policy is based on Portuguese law (Decreto-Lei n.º 84/2021).
faq.returns_note: Before submitting a claim, please ensure the flowers have been kept in water since arrival, away from direct sunlight, and have not been dropped or mishandled.
faq.q1: When is the soonest you can deliver?
faq.a1: For deliveries from Monday to Saturday, we require 5 working hours to process and deliver your order. If you would like a delivery for Sunday, please place your order at least one day in advance.
faq.q2: What delivery methods do you offer?
faq.a2: If convenient, you are welcome to pick up your order in-store; please find our address on the main page. Alternatively, we offer hand-to-hand delivery with rates based on your location. You may also opt for Uber Courier, which is a more affordable method that you arrange yourself.
faq.q3: Can I add a postcard with a message to my order?
faq.a3: Yes, we can add a card with a message for €1. Please let us know when we contact you regarding your order.
faq.q4: Do you offer gift wrapping for bouquets?
faq.a4: We pack each bouquet in an aqua-pack and transport paper only. We do not provide additional gift wrapping, as this is part of our sustainability and waste-reduction policy.
faq.q5: How can I pay for my order?
faq.a5: We accept cash for in-store pickups. For all other orders, you can pay via bank transfer or by credit card.
faq.q6: Can I pay in currencies other than Euro?
faq.a6: Unfortunately, we can only accept payments in Euro (€).
faq.general_note: For any other question, please do not hesitate to contact us via the contact form on the main page.

home.fast_contact: Need it faster or have a question?
